Namespace.description: Filters the results to only those metrics in the specified namespace.

MetricName.description: Filters the results to only the specified metric name.

Dimensions.description: Filters the results to only those metrics that match the specified dimensions.

NextToken.description: The token returned by a previous call to indicate there is more data available.

RecentlyActive.description: To filter the results to show only metrics that have had data points published in the past three hours, specify this parameter with a value of PT3H.

IncludeLinkedAccounts.description: If you are using this operation in a monitoring account, specify true to include metrics from source accounts in the returned data.

OwningAccount.description: When you use this operation in a monitoring account, use this field to return metrics only from one source account.
